name: prompt closed-loop step finetune-to-aibom feeds a registered fine-tune into the AIBOM emitter
command: mkdir -p prompts compliance && printf 'fine_tunes:\n  - {artifact_id: ft-1, base_model: sonnet, training_data: ds-1, license: MIT}\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step finetune-to-aibom --fine-tunes prompts/fine-tunes.yaml --aibom-out compliance/aibom.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"artifact_id":"ft-1"' compliance/aibom.json && echo ok 1>&2
